individual_scores.name: Day 1
individual_scores.description: Day with: St. Lawrence Market, CN Tower, Queen Street Warehouse

individual_scores.name: St. Lawrence Market
individual_scores.description: Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwich

individual_scores.name: CN Tower
individual_scores.description: Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.

individual_scores.name: Queen Street Warehouse
individual_scores.description: Budget-friendly comfort food in a lively setting with a diverse menu.

individual_scores.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
individual_scores.description: Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.

individual_scores.name: Buca Yorkville
individual_scores.description: Upscale Italian dining featuring traditional dishes with a modern twist.

individual_scores.name: The Rex Hotel Jazz & Blues Bar
individual_scores.description: Live jazz performances in a cozy, iconic Toronto venue.

individual_scores.name: Day 2
individual_scores.description: Day with: Pow Wow Cafe, Royal Ontario Museum, Annona Restaurant

individual_scores.name: Pow Wow Cafe
individual_scores.description: Indigenous-inspired brunch featuring bannock tacos in Kensington Market.

individual_scores.name: Royal Ontario Museum
individual_scores.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.

individual_scores.name: Annona Restaurant
individual_scores.description: Sophisticated international cuisine in a bright, modern setting.

individual_scores.name: Casa Loma
individual_scores.description: Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.

individual_scores.name: DaiLo
individual_scores.description: Modern Asian-Canadian fusion cuisine with creative flavors.

individual_scores.name: Rivoli
individual_scores.description: Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.

individual_scores.name: Day 3
individual_scores.description: Day with: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse, Toronto Islands, Amsterdam BrewHouse

individual_scores.name: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse
individual_scores.description: Hearty breakfast featuring smoked meats and classic comfort food.

individual_scores.name: Toronto Islands
individual_scores.description: Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.

individual_scores.name: Amsterdam BrewHouse
individual_scores.description: Lakeside pub offering local craft beers and hearty meals.

individual_scores.name: Distillery District
individual_scores.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.

individual_scores.name: Cluny Bistro
individual_scores.description: French-inspired bistro serving classic and modern dishes.

individual_scores.name: Jazz Bistro
individual_scores.description: Renowned jazz club with intimate setting and excellent acoustics.
